notes: Phase A: 463 batters, 558 pitchers, 247 injuries, 47 news items.

Player news: scraped via XHR endpoint /fantasy/baseball/players/news/all/both/content/xhr/?page=N — restored full pagination (47 items vs yesterday's 10). Page 1 from main HTML, pages 2-5 from XHR endpoint that returns JSON wrapping HTML.
Transactions: 254 rows scraped via /transactions/{id}/all_but_lineup/?print_rows=9999. Action types observed: Activated, Added, Added off Waivers, Dropped, Moved to IR, Traded from <Team>. All known.

Transactions data retrieval used a chunked sessionStorage relay because Chrome MCP truncates JS results around 1000 chars. Encoded as line-delimited <<index>> markers; each chunk passed through pipe-separated player records.
merge_tx.py: 74 new merged → 216 cleaned (288 pre-clean, dropped 72).
roster_sync.py: 2 synthetic transactions added (Elmer Rodriguez add + ghost-drop of Elmer Rodriguez-Cruz on Ballesteros).
Period 3 in progress (2026-04-27 to 2026-05-10). Current matchup: Okamotomami 7.5 vs A Pete Crow-Armstrong Looked at Me 8.5 (improved from yesterday's 6.0-10.0).
Standings: tied 1st (2-0-0) for Okamotomami, alongside Weird Fishes / Arrighetti, Colonel Corbin's Ascent, and Blame it on the Rainiel.
Category breakdown now exposes 16 categories (BA, HR, RBI, R, SB, KO, OBP, SLG, K, ERA, WHIP, W, S, HD, HRA, QS) — previously stored just 6. season_status.json now contains the full 16-cat slate.
Note: CBS team 7 displayed as 'Everythings McGonigle Green' (cbs_rosters.json + standings preserve this name).
cbs_positions.json: 2 new entries added; existing 519 preserved.
Trades page: /trades/ on dpf-host renders the league home, not a trades list — trades are captured per-team via the transactions pages (Traded from <Team> action) so this is non-blocking.
